calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Discharged

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing In Support Of Request For Entry Of Default Judgment By Court (Crc 3.1800)
Off Calendar Jun-05-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: K. Tsenin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Chris Kuhner, Esq. for the plaintiff SMS Financial XXV, LLC, successor in interest to Citibank, N.A.
Counsel's request to proceed with the hearing without live testimony of witness was granted in open court.

Default of Defendants Maven Financial, Inc and Deborah Chang has been duly entered.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages/Principal - $244791.67
Prejudgment Interest $22405.14
Attorneys' fees - $974.25
Costs - $687.58, for a Total of $268,858.64
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
